name: correctover-mcp-server
description: The MCP Reliability Layer for AI — real-time output verification, 6-dimension contract validation, and automatic self-healing for LLM calls

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Send a chat message to an LLM with automatic 6-dimension output verification and self-healing failover

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check health and availability of all configured LLM providers

tools.name: providers
tools.description: List all supported LLM providers with configuration details

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Show session statistics: total calls, validation pass rate, failover count
